name: Four-Chamber Heart (EP)
institution: Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Biomedical Engineering (KIT IBT)
Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Applied and Numerical Mathematics (KIT IANM)
description: Electrophysiology mesh of the four-chamber heart. Fine-resolution tetrahedral mesh with 14 anatomical regions including conduction system structures: sinus node, Bachmann bundle, crista terminalis, and pectinate muscles.
